# Tasks: Test Feature - 6 Phases

**Purpose**: Test fixture for multi-task orchestration with 6 phases (extended workflow)

## Phase 1: Planning

**Goal**: Define feature requirements

- [ ] T001: Review feature specifications
- [ ] T002: Create technical design document
- [ ] T003: Identify dependencies
- [ ] T004: Create task breakdown

## Phase 2: Initialize

**Goal**: Set up project structure

- [ ] T005: Create feature branch
- [ ] T006: Set up directory structure
- [ ] T007: Initialize configuration files
- [ ] T008: Set up development environment

## Phase 3: Implement

**Goal**: Implement core functionality

- [ ] T009: Implement data models
- [ ] T010: Implement business logic
- [ ] T011: Add unit tests
- [ ] T012: Add integration tests
- [ ] T013: Update documentation

## Phase 4: Quality Assurance

**Goal**: Verify implementation quality

- [ ] T014: Run full test suite
- [ ] T015: Perform manual testing
- [ ] T016: Check code coverage
- [ ] T017: Run performance benchmarks

## Phase 5: Review & Fix

**Goal**: Address code review feedback

- [ ] T018: Submit code for review
- [ ] T019: Address review comments
- [ ] T020: Run static analysis
- [ ] T021: Fix linting issues
- [ ] T022: Update based on feedback

## Phase 6: PR/CI/Merge

**Goal**: Complete PR and merge

- [ ] T023: Create pull request
- [ ] T024: Wait for CI checks to pass
- [ ] T025: Get approval from reviewers
- [ ] T026: Merge to main branch
- [ ] T027: Deploy to staging environment
